content.text: All 8 tests pass. Now the GitHub Actions workflow and act harness.

input.content:
name: artifact-cleanup-script

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 3 * * *'
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: Artifact fixture to clean up
        required: false
        default: fixtures/artifacts.json

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  FIXTURE_PATH: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture || 'fixtures/artifacts.json' }}
  CLEANUP_NOW: '2026-04-17T00:00:00Z'

jobs:
  test:
    name: Pester unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run Pester suite
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 -PassThru -Output Detailed
          if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) { throw "Pester failed: $($r.FailedCount)" }
          Write-Host "PESTER_PASSED=$($r.PassedCount)"

  cleanup:
    name: Run cleanup plan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Generate cleanup plan
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          MAX_AGE_DAYS: ${{ vars.MAX_AGE_DAYS || '30' }}
          KEEP_LATEST_N: ${{ vars.KEEP_LATEST_N || '2' }}
          MAX_TOTAL_SIZE: ${{ vars.MAX_TOTAL_SIZE || '1000' }}
        run: |
          ./Invoke-ArtifactCleanup.ps1 `
            -ArtifactsJsonPath $env:FIXTURE_PATH `
            -MaxAgeDays ([int]$env:MAX_AGE_DAYS) `
            -KeepLatestNPerWorkflow ([int]$env:KEEP_LATEST_N) `
            -MaxTotalSizeBytes ([long]$env:MAX_TOTAL_SIZE) `
            -Now $env:CLEANUP_NOW `
            -DryRun

on:
  push:

  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      fixture:
        description: Artifact fixture to clean up
        required: false

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  FIXTURE_PATH: ${{ github.event.inputs.fixture || 'fixtures/artifacts.json' }}
  CLEANUP_NOW: '2026-04-17T00:00:00Z'

jobs:
  test:
    name: Pester unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run Pester suite
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $r = Invoke-Pester -Path ./ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 -PassThru -Output Detailed
          if ($r.FailedCount -gt 0) { throw "Pester failed: $($r.FailedCount)" }
          Write-Host "PESTER_PASSED=$($r.PassedCount)"

  cleanup:
    name: Run cleanup plan
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Generate cleanup plan
        shell: pwsh
        env:
          MAX_AGE_DAYS: ${{ vars.MAX_AGE_DAYS || '30' }}
          KEEP_LATEST_N: ${{ vars.KEEP_LATEST_N || '2' }}
          MAX_TOTAL_SIZE: ${{ vars.MAX_TOTAL_SIZE || '1000' }}
        run: |
          ./Invoke-ArtifactCleanup.ps1 `
            -ArtifactsJsonPath $env:FIXTURE_PATH `
            -MaxAgeDays ([int]$env:MAX_AGE_DAYS) `
            -KeepLatestNPerWorkflow ([int]$env:KEEP_LATEST_N) `
            -MaxTotalSizeBytes ([long]$env:MAX_TOTAL_SIZE) `
            -Now $env:CLEANUP_NOW `
            -DryRun
